title: Nightmare Claw applies attack dice plus one while equipped

plan.title: Nightmare Claw applies attack dice plus one while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Nightmare Claw to a primary creature and verify the printed attack dice bonus.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the attack dice bonus comes only from Nightmare Claw.

steps: Player 1 plays Nightmare Claw and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective attack dice count.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
manualVerification: Confirm the extra attack die is used in battle damage UI.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Nightmare Claw attack dice equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
